name: Virtual Neko Kitty Collector
description: Welcome to Virtual Neko: Kitty Collector, a casual cat game that you can play for free. Dive into a super cute world with cute kittens. Buy items, feed them, and earn red hearts to upgrade your cats yard. Have fun with endless minigames: dice merge, cat clicker game, fun match, and more. Take care of your pets and play with these cute creatures.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
